name: Humanizer
summary: Remove AI writing patterns from text and make the result sound more natural.

summaryI18n.en: Remove AI writing patterns from text and make the result sound more natural.
summaryI18n.zh: 去除文本中的 AI 写作痕迹，让文本表达更自然。

description: Use this skill when editing or reviewing text to reduce obvious AI writing patterns while preserving the original meaning and tone.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when editing or reviewing text to reduce obvious AI writing patterns while preserving the original meaning and tone.
descriptionI18n.zh: 在编辑或审阅文本时使用此技能，减少明显的 AI 写作痕迹，同时保留原意和语气。

author: NextClaw
